allow: Bash(node -e "try { require.resolve\('dotenv'\); console.log\('dotenv: installed'\) } catch { console.log\('dotenv: NOT installed'\) }")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/react-pdf/package.json'\); console.log\('react-pdf:', p.version\); const pd = require\('./node_modules/pdfjs-dist/package.json'\); console.log\('pdfjs-dist:', pd.version\);")
